Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics | IV Therapy & Med Spa in Katy, TX
PRP Facial Katy, TX - 4Ever Young Anti-aging Clinic and Medical Spa

content.text:
Here are several reputable med spas and clinics in Katy, Texas offering PRP (Platelet‑Rich Plasma) facial treatments—sometimes referred to as “Vampire Facials”—often combined with microneedling for enhanced skin rejuvenation:

• **Revitalize Infusion & Aesthetics**  
  Located at 28111 S Firethorne Road, Suite 601, Katy, TX 77494, this med spa offers a “PRP Vampire Facial” combining microneedling with your own platelet-rich plasma to stimulate collagen and promote a youthful glow. The treatment costs around $400 for a 60-minute session([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)). Their providers are certified Nurse Practitioners, and they maintain a 5-star rating([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).

• **4Ever Young Anti‑Aging Clinic**  
  At 23128 Westheimer Parkway, Katy, TX 77494, 4Ever Young offers PRP facials to rejuvenate skin by enhancing collagen production, improving texture, and brightening complexion. Their approach is non‑surgical and tailored to individual needs([4everyoungantiaging.com](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial/?utm_source=openai)). You can contact them at (346) 988‑2190([4everyoungantiaging.com](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Integrative Primary Care**  
  Located at 225 Bella Katy Drive, Katy, TX 77494, this internist‑led practice provides microneedling with PRP. The process involves creating microchannels in the skin and applying a patient’s own platelets to encourage regeneration. Results typically appear over 6–12 weeks as collagen rebuilds beneath the skin([integrativeprimarycare.net](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/microneedling?utm_source=openai)).

• **Mila’s Aesthetic Med Spa**  
  Although based in Houston, they specifically mention providing PRP/plasma facial treatments (including PRP with microneedling) and may serve Katy residents. Their PRP/plasma facial is priced at approximately $399 for a 60-minute session([milasaestheticspa.com](https://www.milasaestheticspa.com/about-us?utm_source=openai)).

• **Jenkins Obstetrics, Gynecology & Reproductive Medicine**  
  With two locations in Katy, this practice offers PRP facials, describing them as a natural, safe alternative that combines PRP with microneedling to lift and tighten skin using the body's own regenerative factors([jenkinsobgyn.com](https://www.jenkinsobgyn.com/med-spa/?utm_source=openai)).

• **Rich & Rooted Medspa**  
  Situated at 24022 Cinco Village Center Blvd, Suite 120 Unit 2, Katy, TX 77494, they offer PRP treatments for facial rejuvenation, scar reduction, and hair restoration. Procedures typically involve blood draw, PRP preparation, and application or injection into target areas([richandrootedmedspa.com](https://www.richandrootedmedspa.com/prp?utm_source=openai)).

—

### How to Choose the Best Option for You

Here are some considerations to guide your decision:

• **Treatment Style:**  
  If you prefer a bundled, spa‑like experience with a clear service menu, *Revitalize* or *Mila’s* may appeal to you. For a more customized medical approach, *Integrative Primary Care* or *4Ever Young* can offer tailored care.

• **Providers & Setting:**  
  *Revitalize* is operated by certified Nurse Practitioners in a med spa environment. *Integrative Primary Care* provides medical oversight from an internist, while *Jenkins OBGYN* brings a physician‑managed setting.

• **Location & Convenience:**  
  For easy access, *Revitalize*, *4Ever Young*, *Jenkins OBGYN*, and *Integrative Primary Care* are located directly in Katy. *Mila’s* is in Houston but nearby.

• **Pricing Transparency:**  
  *Revitalize* lists a price of ~$400 for the PRP Vampire Facial([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)). *Mila’s* lists approximately $399([milasaestheticspa.com](https://www.milasaestheticspa.com/about-us?utm_source=openai)). You'll need to contact the other providers for exact pricing.

—

### Next Steps

1. **Contact your top choices** to inquire about pricing, availability, required pre‑treatment steps, and any consultations.
2. **Ask about expected results, recovery time, and number of sessions typically recommended.**
3. **Review provider qualifications and facility reviews**—online ratings may help, as *Revitalize* has a solid 5-star track record([revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com](https://www.revitalizeinfusionaesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)).
4. **Consider booking a consultation**—especially with providers like *4Ever Young* or *Jenkins*, which offer personalized assessments([4everyoungantiaging.com](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial/?utm_source=openai)).

---

Let me know if you’d like help drafting a message to a spa, or comparing specific details like after‑care protocols or financing options!
